category_sources: Official Apache JMeter site describes JMeter documentation for building and running test plans.
source_facts.description says it is a load testing and performance measurement application.
display_name_sources: Official project homepage and source repository pages use Apache JMeter.
source_facts.homepage is the Apache JMeter site.
docs_sources: Official Apache JMeter User Manual page lists documentation sections including Get Started, Best Practices, and Component Reference.
repo_sources: Official Apache JMeter Source Repositories page lists https://github.com/apache/jmeter as the GitHub read-only repository.
tags_sources: Official Apache JMeter user manual documents test plans, load test running, and analysis.
source_facts.description identifies load testing and performance measurement.
